text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, girls. Can we take a picture together? I want
to send it to my family! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I don't mind. Do you just want a
normal photo of us though?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We could go somewhere nice and wear fancy
clothes to make the photo more special.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...She's right. I think I'll sit this one out. I'm sure
your family wouldn't want to see a plain
Umamusume like me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: No way, I want it normal! And I want my family to see all my precious friends, so you've got to be in the picture.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but deciding on a pose would be nice! How
do you two normally pose for photos?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes I raise both hands, or bring them to
my face... What about you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I try to stand out as little as possible, so I don't
usually pose.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I see... In that case, let's make up a pose that
only we do together!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now that sounds like a fun idea! Let's make
up a super cute pose that will stick in people's
memories!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I feel like that would make the photo kind of
special though. Are you okay with it not being
"normal"?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is different! This kind of special shows
that we're close and having fun together! ♪
